name: Patch LXC Config Env
description: Sets `lxc.environment.<NAME>=<VAL>` in /etc/pve/lxc/<vmid>.conf on the PVE host. The new value is picked up by the container's PID-1 process on next start. Used by refresh-stack task.

parameters.name: LXC Container ID
parameters.description: LXC container ID whose config is patched.

parameters.name: Environment Variable Name
parameters.description: Name of the env variable (e.g. POSTGRES_PASSWORD). Becomes lxc.environment.<NAME>=<VAL>.

parameters.name: New Value
parameters.description: New value for the env variable.
